{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric Combat Art
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Some opponents have mastered an [[Aetheric Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] has mastered an [[Aetheric Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
